name: sound
description: Audio playback and synthesis primitives. Based on iospharo SoundPlugin (Audio Queue Services).
author: Phograph Team

primitives.name: sound-init
primitives.description: Initialize sound output. Inputs: sample rate (e.g. 44100), stereo boolean. Output: success boolean.

primitives.name: sound-play
primitives.description: Play audio samples. Inputs: sample list, start index. Output: samples played count.

primitives.name: sound-stop
primitives.description: Stop sound playback. Output: success boolean.

primitives.name: sound-is-running
primitives.description: Check if sound output is active. Output: boolean.

primitives.name: sound-available
primitives.description: Get available buffer space in samples. Output: sample count.

primitives.name: sound-volume-get
primitives.description: Get current volume level. Output: float 0.0-1.0.

primitives.name: sound-volume-set
primitives.description: Set volume level. Input: float 0.0-1.0. Output: previous volume.

primitives.name: tone-sine
primitives.description: Generate a sine wave tone. Inputs: frequency Hz, duration seconds, sample rate. Output: sample list.

primitives.name: tone-square
primitives.description: Generate a square wave tone. Inputs: frequency Hz, duration seconds, sample rate. Output: sample list.

primitives.name: tone-sawtooth
primitives.description: Generate a sawtooth wave. Inputs: frequency Hz, duration seconds, sample rate. Output: sample list.

primitives.name: tone-silence
primitives.description: Generate silence. Inputs: duration seconds, sample rate. Output: sample list of zeros.

primitives.name: samples-mix
primitives.description: Mix two sample lists by summing. Inputs: samples A, samples B. Output: mixed samples.

primitives.name: samples-concat
primitives.description: Concatenate two sample lists sequentially. Inputs: samples A, samples B. Output: combined samples.

primitives.name: samples-gain
primitives.description: Apply gain to samples. Inputs: samples, gain factor. Output: scaled samples.
